assertions.description: No new .md file was created in ~/Documents/projects/learning-insights/ — the skill should not fabricate an insight when none was provided
A response.txt file exists in the outputs directory, containing the agent's reply to the user

The response asks the user to clarify what they want to capture, rather than making something up or refusing with an error. It should be helpful — pointing to the correct invocation format like '/capture-insight <what you want to capture>'
